string.text:
Prototype of a next-generation anomaly scanner with enhanced multi-layer detection systems. Equipped with a new firmware capable of identifying both visible and dormant anomaly fields stored in the central database, while retaining its artifact detection capabilities. The relative positions of anomaly zones and artifacts are displayed on a dedicated screen. The artifact scanning program—activated by raising the front-facing indicator panel—has been re-engineered, theoretically allowing it to detect previously unknown anomalous formations.

 %c[ui_gray_3]SPECIFICATIONS:
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] advanced scientific instrument
 %c[d_blue] • %c[ui_gray_2] high energy consumption
